fields.title: Romance
fields.description: Romance Ц every story has a beginning, and if it's a love story, the beginning must be extraordinary! This genre encompasses anime whose characters spend days waiting for the moment that will change their lives... On our website, you can watch anime whose atmosphere is permeated with the light and warmth of the most beautiful feeling in the world.

fields.title: Shonen
fields.description: Shonen Ч  anime is aimed at a specific target audience Ч boys and young men aged 12 to 18. The genre's main characteristics include a male protagonist and a fast-paced, dynamic plot (especially noticeable when compared to shojo anime). Shonen anime typically feature more humorous scenes and focus on themes of male friendship, camaraderie, rivalry, sports, and combat.

fields.title: ╤omedy
fields.description: Comedy is a type of anime that focuses on humor: parodies, situation comedies, verbal and stunt jokes.

fields.title: Detective
fields.description: Detective fiction is a genre that will always exist. For as long as there is a "mystery," there will always be someone who must solve it. An ordinary (or not so ordinary) case, and an ordinary (or not so ordinary) detective (amateur or professional), a person in any extraordinary form, who leads the search for answers in the mysterious and enchanting world of intrigue, crime, and sophisticated ghosts.

fields.title: One Piece
fields.description:
Gold Roger, the pirate king who achieved wealth, fame, and power throughout his life, hid a mysterious treasure somewhere in the vastness of this world, known to everyone as "One Piece." After Roger's death, many brave souls set out to find this coveted prize. And so the great age of pirates began!
And so a boy named Luffy, living in a small coastal village, dreams of becoming a pirate. As a child, he accidentally ate a gum-gum fruit and gained incredible abilities. As an adult, he leaves his homeland in pursuit of the greatest treasure!

fields.title: One Piece
fields.description:
Before his execution, the legendary pirate Captain Roger revealed to the world the secret location where he hid his plundered treasure.

Those eager to solve the mystery of the island on the Grand Line turned out to be numerous, and hundreds of brave souls set out to try their luck at this cursed place. But none of them could have imagined the dangers and vicious creatures they would encounter along the way.

fields.title: Sonny Boy
fields.description: On an ordinary day before summer break, the school, along with all the ninth-grade students, is transported to another world. In it, each student gains new abilities, but their problems remain the same. Will the classmates be able to overcome all the difficulties and escape this world back to their home?
